properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 63/17NORWEGIAN SEA
POLARCUS ALIMA  CS C6XK4 WILL CONDUCT SEISMIC SURVEY IN AREA BOUND BY THE FOLLOWING POSITIONS:
A. 66-03.0N 002-37.0E
B. 65-40.0N 006-03.0E
C. 64-18.0N 005-06.0E

D. 64-38.0N 001-46.0E

POLARCUS ALIMA IS TOWING 12 X 9000M LONG CABLES.  WIDE BERTH REQUESTED –
 3NM AHEAD, 3NM ABEAM AND 6NM ASTERN.  GUARD VESSEL IN ATTENDANCE.
